{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":132329,"duration_api_ms":351067,"num_turns":15,"result":"Phase 3 (backup-api-frontend) 완료. 변경 요약:

**1. 새 파일: `src/app/api/admin/backup/[...path]/route.ts`**
- catch-all 프록시 route (GET/POST/PUT)
- `verifySession()` + `getSessionUser()`로 admin 세션 검증
- `ALLOWED_PATHS` 화이트리스트로 허용 경로 제한
- path traversal (`..`) 방어
- NestJS `/backup/{path}`를 API key로 호출, query params/body 그대로 전달

**2. 수정: `BackupSettings.tsx`**
- `NESTJS_API_URL`, `API_PREFIX`, `getCsrfToken()`, `nestjsClientFetch()` 제거
- `backupFetch()` 함수 추가 (`/api/admin/backup/{endpoint}` 경유)
- 8곳의 `nestjsClientFetch` 호출 모두 `backupFetch`로 전환
- `credentials: 'include'`, CSRF 토큰 관련 코드 제거

**AC 결과:**
- `npx tsc --noEmit` — 통과
- `pnpm test` — 내 변경으로 깨진 테스트 없음 (2건 실패는 기존 R2 테스트)
- `pnpm build` — 기존 페이지 모듈 오류 (내 변경 무관)","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"8185b1e0-4b6b-4bfa-b031-49019b447647","total_cost_usd":3.8273539999999984,"usage":{"input_tokens":110,"cache_creation_input_tokens":12044,"cache_read_input_tokens":1310477,"output_tokens":4905,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":12044,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":10,"output_tokens":430,"cache_read_input_tokens":126699,"cache_creation_input_tokens":432,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":432},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-6[1m]":{"inputTokens":299,"outputTokens":20382,"cacheReadInputTokens":2879918,"cacheCreationInputTokens":300216,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":3.8273539999999984,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"b26861e2-8c3d-46cd-9461-83d7bc00e6f0"}
